command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.205 bash -s << 'ENDSSH'
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai
# Find the key Wave 1-relevant functions
grep -n 'def start_governed_phase\|def _launch_background\|def _worker_alive\|def _poll_background\|heartbeat\|stale\|lease\|frozen\|preflight\|reconcil\|def _background_worker\|def run_governed_phase\|def _run_phase_bg\|duplicate\|notification\|checkpoint' runtime/moreno_governed_executor.py | head -60
echo '=BRIDGE_KEY_FUNCS='
grep -n 'def \|job_id\|run_id\|status\|heartbeat\|stale\|lease\|attempt\|lifecycle\|state\|reconcil' runtime/moreno_operator_bridge.py | head -60
echo '=PAC_KEY_FUNCS='
grep -n 'def \|job_id\|run_id\|status\|heartbeat\|stale\|blocked\|attempt\|lifecycle\|reconcil\|duplicate\|notification' runtime/phase_advancement_controller.py | head -60
ENDSSH
